title: CES 2026 abuzz with AI's evolving role in Hollywood
text:
CES 2026 abuzz with AI's evolving role in Hollywood
2026-01-08
AI's expanding role in entertainment is a major topic at CES 2026 this week, with industry leaders discussing how AI is transforming storytelling and advertising while emphasizing its potential to empower creators rather than replace them. They are also addressing concerns about IP protection and the quality of AI-generated content. Exhibitors are showcasing AI-powered devices, including smart headphones and interactive entertainment tools.
